name: Strawberries Romanoff Muffins
recipeIngredient: 4 English muffins, split and lightly toasted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, puree the raisins with cinnamon and nutmeg.
2. Add 2 tablespoons of sour cream to the mixture and blend until combined.
3. Spread the raisin mixture evenly on the muffins.
4. Arrange strawberries on top of the muffins.
5. Combine the remaining sour cream and brown sugar, then spoon over the strawberries.
6. Sprinkle with toasted almonds.
Note: This recipe was shared by Al Rice from North Pole, Alaska in February 1994.
